home.tip-text-1: They are crops of high genetic value. These crops have a high productive potential; they produce up to 10 times more per surface area compared to the same crop produced in open fields.  Water-soluble fertilizers are used for these crops.
home.tip-text-2: These are of the annual production type. Mentioning some, we have avocado, citrus, coconut, mango, coffee bean, among others.
home.tip-text-3: All types of crops produced on a large scale. It can be under protected environment or in open field.
home.form-title: SIGN UP FOR OUR NEXT MONTHLY NEWSLETTERS

about-us.title: WHO ARE WE?
about-us.text-1: We are a formulator and marketer of granular fertilizers and specialties for agriculture in the Dominican Republic and all the Caribbean islands.
about-us.text-2: Was founded in July 2013, since then; it has come to revolutionize the fertilizer market, guaranteeing quality and a fair price for the benefit of all agricultural producers in the country.
about-us.text-3: At Abodom we supply different types of fertilizers to the Dominican Republic and Caribbean market, according to the requirements of each crop.
about-us.vision-text: To lead the marketing of fertilizers in the Caribbean, innovating solutions for sustainable agriculture, profitable for customers, employees and shareholders.
about-us.mission-text: We produce and commercialize fertilizers, with high quality standards, developing solutions for the agricultural sector through a personalized technical service, to guarantee the success of the crops.
about-us.value-text-1: We encourage collaboration in order to achieve our goals.
about-us.value-text-2: We make the needs of external and internal customers our own, and give our all to achieve a memorable experience.
about-us.value-text-3: We are passionate about doing things right.
about-us.value-text-4: We treat people with dignity, valuing their ideas and opinions. We respect the environment in which we operate.
about-us.value-text-5: We work hard enough to create or reinvent products, services and processes, taking best practices as a reference, always seeking continuous improvement.
about-us.value-text-6: We provide products and services with the highest quality standards.
about-us.value-text-7: We align our work to the achievement of the company's strategic objectives. We focus our efforts on concrete results.

products.formula-text: Special formulas according to crop requirements and grower's request.

contact.hours: Business Hours: Monday to Friday from 7:30 A.M. to 5:00 P.M.
